dailyNews.title: Iran claims it shot down another US F-35 jet, says ‘crash generated massive explosion’; pilot feared dead
dailyNews.description: Iran claims to have shot down another US F-35 fighter jet using its advanced air-defence system, raising pilot survival concerns after a massive explosion. This follows previous claims of downing an F-35, highlighting upgrades in Iran's air defence capabilities.

dailyNews.title: Cuba to pardon more than 2,000 prisoners amid US pressure
dailyNews.description: Releasing political prisoners in Cuba has long been a US core demand as oil blockade continues.

dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court rebuked California for hiding students' gender transitions from parents, as HHS and CMS now propose new Medicaid funding rules.

dailyNews.description: Michelle Pfeiffer leads a wave of Hollywood A-listers embracing the drama of Taylor Sheridan's Western TV universe on hits like The Madison and 1923.

dailyNews.title: DHS preps deportation of alleged MS-13 gang member wanted for pastor's murder in El Salvador
dailyNews.description: An alleged MS-13 gang member from El Salvador who is accused of murdered a pastor and was released into the U.S. in 2016 is now in ICE custody, DHS says.

dailyNews.title: Viral Easter candy trends pair giant 'smash eggs,' pricey treats with 'better-for-you' swaps
dailyNews.description: Retro freeze-dried favorites, Dubai-style chocolate eggs and giant smash bunnies lead the viral Easter candy trends taking over TikTok and baskets in 2026.

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods utters sarcastic 3-word remark after getting placed in back of cop car during DUI arrest
dailyNews.description: Bodycam footage showed Tiger Woods groggily saying "this is fun" in the back of a cop car after his DUI arrest and vehicle crash last Friday.

dailyNews.title: Gen Z still drinks, just earlier as the ‘daycap’ trend begins upending nightlife
dailyNews.description: Gen Z individuals are drinking more intentionally, favoring brunch and mocktails over bar crawls, as wellness and productivity reshape younger drinking culture.

dailyNews.title: As H-1B Visa Program Changes, Skilled Foreign Workers Consider Leaving U.S.
dailyNews.description: As the Trump administration cracks down on the H-1B visa program, which allows skilled workers like software engineers to work in the United States, foreign professionals are debating whether to stay and build careers or quit the American Dream.

dailyNews.title: Liberal Group Warns That Trump Could Have Two More Supreme Court Picks
dailyNews.description: Demand Justice plans to tie Republicans running for Senate this year to a possible fight to fill vacancies that could emerge on the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.title: Pam Bondi Responds After Trump Fires Her as Attorney General
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced on Thursday that he has fired Pam Bondi as Attorney General and said she will be transitioning to a “new job in the private sector.” Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche, who once served as Trump’s personal defense lawyer during his hush money trial in New York, is set to replace her as acting attorney general. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports and Kristen Welker, moderator of Meet the Press, joins TODAY with analysis.

dailyNews.title: Evangelicals backed Trump. Now pastors denounce his ICE crackdown hitting their churches.
dailyNews.description: Amid ICE arrests and detentions, attendance has dropped and churches have closed. 'You're deporting the future of American Christianity,' a Latino evangelical leader said.

dailyNews.title: Iran hits Gulf states as Trump touts strikes on civilian infrastructure
dailyNews.description: After Trump warns there's "much more to follow" after an Iranian bridge is blown up, Iran targets key oil, gas and water infrastructure in the Persian Gulf.

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods arrest video shows golf icon saying he just spoke to "the president"
dailyNews.description: Golf icon Tiger Woods told officers at the scene of a Florida car crash where he was arrested for DUI that he was "just talking to the president." It's unclear if Woods was referring to President Trump. CBS News' Nicole Valdes reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump ousts Pam Bondi as attorney general, names Todd Blanche as acting AG
dailyNews.description: President Trump has fired Pam Bondi as U.S. attorney general. It's the second time in less than a month that Mr. Trump has ousted a member of his Cabinet. Todd Blanche will serve as acting attorney general until Mr. Trump decides who will run the DOJ. Weijia Jiang reports.

dailyNews.title: Eye Opener: Artemis II crew leaves Earth's orbit, reaching major milestone in mission
dailyNews.description: The Artemis II crew leaves Earth's orbit and speaks about their mission so far. Plus, President Trump fires Pam Bondi as attorney general. All that and all that matters in today's Eye Opener.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.
